recent.statement: Ukraine warfronts will see increased artillery exchanges in eastern regions due to stalled ceasefire negotiations
recent.evidence: S1 only shows ongoing active frontlines as a general condition, not any increase in artillery exchanges or ceasefire negotiation context.

recent.statement: An earthquake will occur in the South Sandwich Islands with a magnitude above 6.0
recent.evidence: No signal's text reports any M6.0+ earthquake in the South Sandwich Islands during the window, though such an event would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: Severe thunderstorm in Houston, Texas causes localized power outages
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, so there is no evidence the Houston thunderstorm or resulting power outages occurred within the window.

recent.statement: Flash flood warnings in New Mexico and Colorado will cause temporary disruptions to coal transportation infrastructure
recent.evidence: No admissible signal shows flash flood warnings disrupting coal transportation infrastructure in New Mexico, and such an event would have been captured within the closed window.

recent.statement: A major earthquake will strike near Tokyo in the next week
recent.evidence: No signal reports a major earthquake striking near Tokyo during the window, an event that would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: Bab el-Mandeb chokepoint risk rating escalates to 'CRITICAL' due to Houthi naval activity
recent.evidence: No signal mentions Bab el-Mandeb, Houthi activity, or any escalation to a CRITICAL risk rating; all signals concern unrelated straits.

recent.statement: Flash flood warnings in Colorado trigger temporary 15% surge in Texas electricity demand
recent.evidence: No signal shows any Colorado flood warning causing a 15% surge in Texas electricity demand, an event that would certainly have been captured.

recent.statement: A tropical cyclone will make landfall in Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula
recent.evidence: None of the named cyclones (BERTHA near Texas, FAUSTO/ELIDA in the Pacific, NOUL in NW Pacific) is located at or made landfall in Mexico's Yucatan Peninsula.

recent.statement: Flash flood warnings in Colorado will disrupt 15-20% of regional electricity grid capacity
recent.evidence: No signal shows flash flooding disrupting 15-20% of Colorado's grid capacity, an event that would certainly have been captured in the infrastructure or outage sections.

recent.statement: A Category 2 hurricane will make landfall in Florida within the next week
recent.evidence: No signal shows any Category 2 hurricane making landfall in Florida; the only nearby cyclone (BERTHA-26) was a tropical storm affecting zero population, far from Florida.

recent.statement: A major cyberattack will occur on a major US corporation within the next week.
recent.evidence: No admissible signal text shows a major cyberattack on a major US corporation occurred during the window.

recent.statement: A severe heatwave will affect major cities across Europe within the next week.
recent.evidence: No captured signal concerns this forecast, and a severe European heatwave affecting major cities would certainly have been captured within the closed window.

self_calibration.note: Published headline probability is RAW conviction (unchanged); this is the honest companion. Calibration fixes overconfidence, not discrimination — see /calibration.
